channel.title: Software on Daragh Hollman
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Daragh Hollman

item.title: Juno Universal Plotting Tool (JUPT)
item.description: In the summer of 2023, together with the DIAS Planetary Magnetospheres group, I led the development and release of a new plotting tool for data from the Juno spacecraft (currently in orbit around Jupiter).

item.title: Horizons Wallpaper
item.description: A python script to plot a live wallpaper of the solar system from the orbital information of specified objects. A sample output from the script. This script queries the API of NASA JPL’s Horizons System to obtain orbital positions in cartesian coorinates.
